description:
The quiz evaluates practical knowledge of modern CSS, testing the ability to recognize current best practices and assess whether CSS expertise is resume‑worthy. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, using a light‑hearted, encouraging tone to motivate learners to gauge their skill level.
Topics: Modern CSS features, Responsive design, CSS layout techniques, Browser compatibility, CSS tooling and preprocessors
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and anyone looking to validate or showcase their CSS proficiency.
